tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj zdania. Wykorzystując wyrazy podane wielkimi literami, uzupełnij każde zdanie z luką tak, aby precyzyjnie oddać sens zdania wyjściowego. Nie zmieniaj formy podanych wyrazów. W każdą lukę możesz wpisać maksymalnie pięć wyrazów, wliczając w to wyraz już podany.

items.original: It was a mistake to leave the door unlocked.
"You should try eating less sugar," the doctor said to him.
Playing video games for hours is not good for your eyes.
items.transformed: You should _________ for hours if you want to protect your eyes.

items.original: He was so tired that he fell asleep during the film.
items.transformed: He did not (didn't) _________ awake during the film.

items.original: It is not allowed to use your phone in the library.
items.transformed: You are _________ your phone in the library.

items.original: I started learning French three years ago.
items.transformed: I have _________ French for three years.
